name: My Favorite Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar in a mixer bowl until light.
2. Add eggs, milk, and vanilla and blend well.
3. Stir together flour, baking powder, and salt. Add to creamed mixture and blend well.
4. Divide dough into 3 parts; wrap each snugly in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 hours or until firm enough to roll out.
5. Dust work surface and rolling pin with flour. Roll out 1 piece of dough at a time to 1/8-inch thickness.
6. Cut with cookie cutters (press cutters into flour before using on dough. Chill dough if necessary.).
7. Place cookies on greased baking sheet. Sprinkle with sugar sprinkles.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 13 minutes, or until golden. Cool on wire racks.
Note: Each cookie contains about:
121 calories; 109 mg sodium; 28 mg cholesterol; 7 grams fat; 13 grams carbohydrates; 1 gram protein; 0 grams fiber; 52% of calories from fat.
